assets.notes: Real Casa Cabane walkthrough. The committed file is deploy-safe; keep the high-quality master local as public/media/casa-cabane-walkthrough-master-local.mp4.
Poster image used for gateway, fallback, and collection card.

Casa Fabiola, Louise Marie, Thelma & Louise, Heritage Collection, and The Love Nest need owner-approved image sets before Airbnb-style galleries can use real photos. Airbnb-hosted photos are not copied into this repo.
